rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow Admin to add a new company.
The system shall allow Admin to delete or update a company.
The system shall keep track of students interested in placements for Admin.
The system shall allow Admin to add a new training for students.
The system shall allow Admin to update or delete a training.
The system shall allow User to register for a particular job.
The system shall allow User to register for a particular company.
The system shall allow User to undertake a training.
The system shall allow User to submit a resume.
The system shall allow User to update their resume.
The system shall allow Company to register in the placement office.
The system shall allow Company to view a student's resume.
The system shall allow Company to recruit a student with a good resume and relevant skills.
The system shall allow Company to recruit a student trained in a specific area.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Admin can add a new company
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Admin can ◾ Add a new company

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Admin keeps track of students interested in placements
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: ◾ Keeps track of students interested in placements

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Admin can add a new training for students
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: ◾ Add a new training for students (which is demanded by many companies)
◾ Update/delete a training (which are not demanded by many companies), etc.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: User can register for a particular job
User can register for a particular company
Company can register in the placement office
Company can recruit a student with good resume and skills
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: ◾ Recruit a student with good resume and skills

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Company can recruit a student trained in a specific area
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: ◾ Recruit a student trained in a specific area, etc. (Figures 31.1–31.8)
